case_title: TIMOTHY DONOHOUE VS. STARTUPPERZ INC., A SUSPENDED DELAWARE CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF DONOHOUE, TIMOTHY AS TO DEFENDANT STARTUPPERZ INC., A SUSPENDED DELAWARE CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DONOHOUE, TIMOTHY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT STARTUPPERZ INC., A SUSPENDED DELAWARE CORPORATION $118,257.25 PRINCIPAL, $452.65 INTEREST, $450.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $119,159.90, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
